title: Congenital microcephaly and hypotonia
abstract: Patients present with microcephaly, decreased muscle tone (hypotonia), and developmental delay. Genetic testing often targets primary microcephaly genes.

title: Marfan syndrome: connective tissue disorder
abstract: Tall stature, lens dislocation, aortic root dilation characterize Marfan syndrome. FBN1 mutations are typical.

title: Mitochondrial disease with lactic acidosis
abstract: Lactic acidosis, exercise intolerance, and neuromuscular weakness are common in mitochondrial disorders.

title: Autism spectrum and developmental delay
abstract: Communication challenges, social interaction differences, and developmental delay are hallmark features.

title: Hypertrophic cardiomyopathy in pediatrics
abstract: Pediatric cardiomyopathy involves left ventricular hypertrophy, arrhythmias, and risk of sudden cardiac death.
